'''Algar Mining''' ran all [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations in the [[Algaran system]] from its headquarters on [[Algarine]]. It was subjected to frequent sabotage perpetrated by the [[Imperial Resistance]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
